They're very attentive, but they're slow.

reviews.comment:
Cargando Infinita,sábados y domingos,te descuentan 100$  cada 20 litros,que cargued

(Translated by Google)
With Infinita charging, on Saturdays and Sundays, you get a $100 discount for every 20 liters you fill up.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2511053987051317301/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNJc1pfWHlRRRAB

reviews.comment:
El playero derramo nafta y no me la quisieron descontar. Me hicieron pagar por un lado las cosas del kiosko y por otro lado la nafta. Lenta atención, no volvería.

(Translated by Google)
The gas station attendant spilled gas and they refused to give me a discount. They made me pay for the concession stand items separately from the gas. Slow service, I wouldn't go back.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2511053987051317301/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNJa2JHeDF3RRAB
